metadata.description: The Microsoft Sentinel workspace into which the function will be deployed. Has to be in the selected Resource Group.
The region of the selected workspace. The default value will use the Region selection above.

properties.displayName: Authentication ASIM parser for Palo Alto PAN-OS GlobalProtect
properties.query:
let EventSeverityLookup = datatable (LogSeverity: string, EventSeverity: string)
[
    "0", "Low",
    "1", "Low",
    "2", "Low",
    "3", "Low",
    "4", "Low",
    "5", "Low",
    "6", "Medium",
    "7", "Medium",
    "8", "Medium",
    "9", "High",
    "10", "High",
    "Informational", "Informational"
];
let parser = (disabled: bool=false, pack: bool=false) {
    CommonSecurityLog
    | where not(disabled)
        and DeviceVendor == "Palo Alto Networks"
        and DeviceProduct == "PAN-OS"
        and DeviceEventClassID == "GLOBALPROTECT"
    | where AdditionalExtensions has_any ("gateway-login", "gateway-logout", "gateway-auth", "portal-auth", "portal-prelogin", "gateway-connected")
    | parse-kv AdditionalExtensions as (
        PanOSEventID: string,
        PanOSStage: string,
        PanOSLogTimeStamp: string,
        PanOSAuthMethod: string,
        PanOSTunnelType: string,
        PanOSSourceUserName: string,
        PanOSSourceRegion: string,
        PanOSEndpointDeviceName: string,
        PanOSPublicIPv4: string,
        PanOSPublicIPv6: string,
        PanOSPrivateIPv4: string,
        PanOSPrivateIPv6: string,
        PanOSHostID: string,
        PanOSGlobalProtectClientVersion: string,
        PanOSEndpointOSType: string,
        PanOSEndpointOSVersion: string,
        PanOSEventStatus: string,
        PanOSGPGatewayLocation: string,
        PanOSPortal: string,
        PanOSLoginDuration: string,
        PanOSConnectionError: string,
        PanOSDescription: string,
        PanOSDeviceSN: string,
        PanOSVirtualSystem: string
    ) with (pair_delimiter=";", kv_delimiter="=")
    | extend EventType = case(
          PanOSEventID =~ "gateway-login", "Logon",
          PanOSEventID =~ "gateway-logout", "Logoff",
          PanOSEventID =~ "gateway-auth", "Logon",
          PanOSEventID =~ "portal-auth", "Logon",
          PanOSEventID =~ "portal-prelogin", "Logon",
          PanOSEventID =~ "gateway-connected", "Logon",
          ""
      )
    | where isnotempty(EventType)
    | extend LogonMethod = case(
          PanOSAuthMethod =~ "LDAP", "Username & Password",
          PanOSAuthMethod =~ "RADIUS", "Username & Password",
          PanOSAuthMethod =~ "SAML", "Other",
          PanOSAuthMethod =~ "certificate", "PKI",
          PanOSAuthMethod =~ "local-database", "Username & Password",
          PanOSAuthMethod =~ "Kerberos", "Username & Password",
          PanOSAuthMethod =~ "TACACS+", "Username & Password",
          PanOSAuthMethod =~ "Cookie", "Other",
          ""
      )
    | invoke _ASIM_ResolveDvcFQDN('DeviceName')
    | invoke _ASIM_ResolveSrcFQDN('PanOSEndpointDeviceName')
    | lookup EventSeverityLookup on LogSeverity
    | extend EventSeverity = iif(isempty(EventSeverity), "Informational", EventSeverity)
    | extend
        EventResult = case(
            PanOSEventStatus =~ "success", "Success",
            PanOSEventStatus =~ "failure", "Failure",
            isnotempty(PanOSConnectionError), "Failure",
            "Success"
        ),
        EventResultDetails = case(
            PanOSConnectionError has "auth", "No such user or password",
            PanOSConnectionError has "expired", "Session expired",
            PanOSConnectionError has "timeout", "Session expired",
            PanOSConnectionError has "cert", "Incorrect key",
            PanOSConnectionError has "policy", "Logon violates policy",
            PanOSConnectionError has "locked", "User locked",
            PanOSConnectionError has "disabled", "User disabled",
            isnotempty(PanOSConnectionError), "Other",
            ""
        ),
        TargetUsername = coalesce(SourceUserName, PanOSSourceUserName),
        SrcIpAddr = coalesce(SourceIP, PanOSPublicIPv4, PanOSPublicIPv6),
        EventStartTime = coalesce(todatetime(PanOSLogTimeStamp), TimeGenerated),
        EventMessage = Message,
        SrcDvcOs = coalesce(PanOSEndpointOSVersion, PanOSEndpointOSType),
        TargetAppName = coalesce(PanOSPortal, "GlobalProtect"),
        TargetAppType = "Service",
        AdditionalFields = iff(
            pack,
            bag_pack(
                "PanOSPortal", PanOSPortal,
                "PanOSGPGatewayLocation", PanOSGPGatewayLocation,
                "PanOSTunnelType", PanOSTunnelType,
                "PanOSGlobalProtectClientVersion", PanOSGlobalProtectClientVersion,
                "PanOSLoginDuration", PanOSLoginDuration,
                "PanOSHostID", PanOSHostID,
                "PanOSSourceRegion", PanOSSourceRegion,
                "PanOSVirtualSystem", PanOSVirtualSystem,
                "PanOSDescription", PanOSDescription,
                "PanOSPrivateIPv4", PanOSPrivateIPv4,
                "PanOSPrivateIPv6", PanOSPrivateIPv6,
                "PanOSDeviceSN", PanOSDeviceSN,
                "PanOSStage", PanOSStage
            ),
            dynamic([])
        )
    | project-rename
        DvcIpAddr = Computer,
        DvcId = DeviceExternalID,
        EventOriginalSeverity = LogSeverity,
        EventOriginalType = DeviceEventClassID,
        EventOriginalUid = ExtID,
        EventProductVersion = DeviceVersion,
        EventOriginalSubType = PanOSEventID,
        EventOriginalResultDetails = PanOSConnectionError,
        LogonProtocol = PanOSTunnelType,
        TargetIpAddr = DestinationIP,
        EventUid = _ResourceId
    | extend
        Dvc = coalesce(DvcFQDN, DvcId, DvcHostname, DvcIpAddr),
        EventEndTime = EventStartTime,
        Dst = TargetIpAddr,
        Src = coalesce(SrcFQDN, SrcHostname, SrcIpAddr),
        TargetUserType = _ASIM_GetUserType(TargetUsername, ""),
        User = TargetUsername,
        IpAddr = SrcIpAddr,
        DvcIdType = iff(isnotempty(DvcId), "Other", ""),
        TargetUsernameType = _ASIM_GetUsernameType(TargetUsername),
        Application = TargetAppName,
        DvcAction = iff(EventResult == "Success", "Allowed", "Blocked"),
        TargetHostname = DvcHostname,
        TargetDomain = DvcDomain,
        TargetDomainType = DvcDomainType,
        EventSubType = "Remote",
        EventSchema = "Authentication",
        EventSchemaVersion = "0.1.4",
        EventProduct = "PAN-OS",
        EventVendor = "Palo Alto",
        Type = "CommonSecurityLog",
        EventCount = int(1)
    | project
        TimeGenerated,
        EventType,
        EventResult,
        EventResultDetails,
        EventOriginalResultDetails,
        EventMessage,
        EventStartTime,
        EventEndTime,
        EventCount,
        EventSeverity,
        EventOriginalSeverity,
        EventOriginalType,
        EventOriginalSubType,
        EventOriginalUid,
        EventSubType,
        EventProduct,
        EventProductVersion,
        EventVendor,
        EventSchema,
        EventSchemaVersion,
        EventUid,
        Dvc,
        DvcIpAddr,
        DvcId,
        DvcIdType,
        DvcHostname,
        DvcDomain,
        DvcFQDN,
        DvcDomainType,
        TargetUsername,
        TargetUsernameType,
        TargetUserType,
        User,
        TargetAppName,
        TargetAppType,
        TargetIpAddr,
        Dst,
        SrcIpAddr,
        SrcHostname,
        SrcDomain,
        SrcFQDN,
        SrcDomainType,
        SrcDvcOs,
        Src,
        IpAddr,
        LogonMethod,
        LogonProtocol,
        Application,
        DvcAction,
        TargetHostname,
        TargetDomain,
        TargetDomainType,
        AdditionalFields,
        Type
};
parser(disabled=disabled, pack=pack)
